The operation against the a hardline Islamist cell cell in Seattle achieved all objectives. The planned a hostage-taking event against a sports stadium has been permanently disrupted. 2 operatives are in custody, including cell leader "COBRA". Intelligence exploitation of seized materials is the immediate priority — hard drives containing operational planning documents are expected to yield significant insights into the wider network. Element RAPTOR performance during the breach phase was exemplary and directly contributed to the rapid, non-lethal subduing of the primary target. Operational security was maintained throughout.
